title: Can't see any filter values past 2 values
excerpt: If we have more than 2 values to filter in, then all the values past 2 never gets seen because the text dropdown field doesn’t expand to display all selected values. I can’t expand the dropdown to see all selected values…

posts.author: raylai (Ray Lai)
posts.cookedHtml: If we have more than 2 values to filter in, then all the values past 2 never gets seen because the text dropdown field doesn’t expand to display all selected values. I can’t expand the dropdown to see all selected values. It’s super annoying to not be able to see what’s selected.
